name: XVape Mambo Cheech and Chong Vaporizer
summary: A compact convection vaporiser with auto-draw and a removable battery, for patients wanting clean, on-demand vapour.
description: The XVape Mambo uses convection heating, vaporising a loosely packed bowl with heated intake air for tastier, less sedating vapour than conduction units that cram the chamber. It offers both on-demand and session modes with auto-draw activation, so it heats as you inhale. The battery is removable, letting you carry spares, and it charges over USB-C with heat-up between 15 and 40 seconds. Food-grade silicone parts and a low price make it an honest entry-level convection option for patients.
